name: foldweave
description: Plan and review connected-folder changes with Foldweave.

interface.shortDescription: Change the structure. Keep the connections.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex to plan a connected-folder change, review it before creating a separate verified copy, apply a Foldweave Change File, or recreate the selected original layout.
defaultPrompt: Plan a folder change and show me the proposal.
Review this Foldweave Change File before applying it.
Verify this result or recreate its original layout.
